title: Vanilla Extra Difficulty
description: This datapack is designed for players seeking an extra layer of challenge and excitement in their survival gameplay.
body:
This Datapack transforms your Minecraft experience by introducing a new level of difficulty to the familiar world you thought you knew. It is designed for players seeking an extra layer of challenge and excitement in their survival gameplay. Key features include but are not limited to:
  • Wither Skeletons can spawn with bows.
  • Zombies that spawn in Mineshafts now spawn Pickaxes and Golden Helmets.
  • Pillager Captains can use Goat Horns to boost nearby raiders.
  • Zombies in savannahs, plains and snowy plains can spawn riding zombie horses.
  • Spiders place cobweb when near a player.
  • Witches splash nearby hostiles with potions.
  • Piglins can sometimes spawn as "Fungus Throwers" (From Minecraft Dungeons).
  • Vindicators can sometimes spawn as "Chefs" (From Minecraft Dungeons).
  • Mobs that spawn in the Deepslate Layer of the world often spawn with armor, status effects, and enchanted weapons.
  • Allays that hold any type of sword can "attack" when close to a hostile and can use Shield to block incoming arrows.
  • Blazes regenerate when standing on fire.
  • Eating glow berries removes the darkness effect.
  • Using a goat horn will reveal nearby mobs.
  • Pillagers can spawn with fireworks on their offhand.
  • Illusioners can rarely spawn instead of a Stray.
